# AECOM

**Category:** EPC and Commissioning Partners
**Website:** https://www.aecom.com/

## Headline
Engineering and delivery partner with broad infrastructure and commissioning relevance for AI capacity projects.

## Overview
AECOM contributes to buyer decisions where the project risk is in execution quality and delivery sequencing rather than pure hardware procurement. For AI infrastructure initiatives, especially in non-greenfield contexts, delivery discipline can be as important as component choice.

## Key capabilities
- project execution and delivery planning
- engineering and infrastructure integration
- commissioning and implementation support

## Best fit for
- teams balancing speed, permitting, and staged deployment
- buyers evaluating whether to partner with integrated integrators
- projects requiring coordination across vendors and utility readiness

## Considerations
This profile is best used as a delivery/commissioning signal, not as a single hardware procurement recommendation.
